tasks.label: Run auth-service Java17 skip-tests
args: set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 && set Path=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;%Path% && mvn -Dmaven.test.skip=true -f backend/auth-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run

tasks.label: Diag docker to file
args: $o=@(); $o += '==docker version=='; $o += (docker version 2>&1 | Out-String); $o += '==compose ps=='; $o += (docker compose ps mongodb redis kafka 2>&1 | Out-String); $o += '==mongodb logs=='; $o += (docker compose logs --tail=80 mongodb 2>&1 | Out-String); $o -join "`n" | Set-Content -Path 'logs/docker-mongo-diag.txt'

tasks.label: Diag docker to file cmd
args: cd /d D:\Projects\jirathon && (echo ==docker version==> logs\docker-mongo-diag.txt) && (docker version >> logs\docker-mongo-diag.txt 2>&1) && (echo.>> logs\docker-mongo-diag.txt) && (echo ==compose ps==>> logs\docker-mongo-diag.txt) && (docker compose ps mongodb redis kafka >> logs\docker-mongo-diag.txt 2>&1) && (echo.>> logs\docker-mongo-diag.txt) && (echo ==mongodb logs==>> logs\docker-mongo-diag.txt) && (docker compose logs --tail=100 mongodb >> logs\docker-mongo-diag.txt 2>&1)

tasks.label: Docker desktop process
args: Get-Process -Name 'Docker Desktop','com.docker.backend' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: Docker backend process
args: Get-Process -Name "Docker Desktop","com.docker.backend" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path | Format-Table -AutoSize
